design_philosophy: A cozy, healing mobile game experience emphasizing fluffy, bubbly aesthetics. Use exaggerated rounded corners, translucent 'bubble' borders, and soft pastel color palettes to evoke warmth and safety. High-readability with dark navy/charcoal text over creamy backgrounds. Visual tension is created through scale (large bubbly cards vs. tiny floating sparkles) and organic, non-rigid layouts.

motion_and_animations.sticker_float: Continuous smooth vertical translation using reanimated withRepeat and withTiming, duration 2000ms, displacement +/- 6px.
motion_and_animations.button_press: Scale down to 0.92 using withSpring (damping: 12, stiffness: 200).
motion_and_animations.trade_accept: Explosion of pastel confetti / scaling up of accepted sticker, fading out with timing.
motion_and_animations.ai_paw_reach: TranslateY from -120 to 0 with a bouncy spring effect to signify AI placing a sticker onto the table.

StickerCard.container_style: Background color dynamically matches rarity. BorderRadius 24. BorderWidth 4, borderColor '#FFFFFF' (bubble effect). Apply 'soft_float' shadow.
StickerCard.image_style: Fluffy character image, scaled to fill 80% of card, perfectly centered.

TradeTable.container_style: Large rounded rectangle taking middle 40% of screen. Background 'surface_cloud' with blur (if expo-blur available) or solid white with 0.85 opacity. BorderWidth 3 of '#B5EAD7' (pastel mint).
TradeTable.drop_zone_style: Dashed border inside the table to indicate where user places their sticker.

ActionButtons.accept_style: Pill shape (borderRadius pill), 'primary_accent' background, large 'primary_font' text 'ACCEPT'.
ActionButtons.reject_style: Pill shape, white background with deep charcoal border, charcoal text 'REJECT'.

InventoryScroller.container_style: Bottom 25% of screen. Horizontal ScrollView. PaddingHorizontal 16. Gap 12 between stickers. showsHorizontalScrollIndicator=false.

StickerdexGrid.container_style: Masonry or flexible wrap grid. Missing stickers use opacity 0.3 and tintColor '#A0AEC0' (silhouette effect).

backgrounds.description: Serene pastel pink cloud background - use for main Trade Screen
White clouds and blue sky - use for Stickerdex Collection Background

stickers_and_paws.description: Fluffy white cat paw with pink pads - use for AI opponent paw coming from top
Hello Kitty latte art / cute creature - use as sample Legendary sticker
White fluffy sheep face - use as sample Common sticker

instructions_to_main_agent: Write standard .js files for React Native Expo, mapping these design tokens to StyleSheet objects or inline styles.
Ensure react-native-reanimated is fully configured and use it for all bouncy and floating micro-interactions (e.g. useSharedValue, useAnimatedStyle).
Integrate 'Fredoka' and 'Nunito' via expo-font (or fallback to rounded system fonts temporarily while loading) to maintain the kawaii aesthetic.

Implement the Trade loop logic visually: The AI paw animates from the top holding a sticker. The user selects one from the bottom horizontal scroller to place in the middle trade table. AI evaluates using rarity values.
Avoid sharp edges entirely. All UI cards, buttons, and images must have generous border radii (24-32px).
Apply `data-testid` props to all interactive elements for testing (e.g., testID='trade-accept-button').
Layer the provided cloud backgrounds using ImageBackground with a soft semi-transparent overlay (rgba(255,255,255,0.4)) so the colorful stickers and text remain highly legible.
